name: https-duckdb
description: Read files from an HTTP/HTTPS URL into DuckDB using the appropriate file reader

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: HTTP headers to include in the request

path.title: URI
path.description: HTTP/HTTPS URL to the remote file

errorMessage.pattern: URI must start with http:// or https://

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: https
[[ renderProps .config_props ]]

files.name: model
files.code_template:
type: model
connector: duckdb
[[ if .connector_name -]]
create_secrets_from_connectors: "[[ .connector_name ]]"
[[ end -]]
sql: |
  [[ duckdbSQL .path true ]]
